candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; equals Net turnover across years and is the clearest canonical revenue label.
Not revenue; COGS-related depreciation.
COGS, not revenue.
Also a valid revenue label; same values as Total Revenue, useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Other operating income, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Priority list for revenue line labels; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label populated in recent years.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Direct cost-of-sales label used in some years; useful fallback.
Broad but valid direct cost-of-revenue/COGS label; populated across years.
Only a depreciation component of COGS, not full COGS.

candidates.row_label: Cost of goods solds - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, should not be preferred.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Priority list of reported COGS/cost-of-sales labels across years; excludes depreciation-only and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A row exists but appears empty in preview; per rules include it plus component rows for coverage.
Clear SG&A component.
Small overhead/operating expense bucket; valid SG&A-type component.
D&A should be excluded from XSGA.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists but is empty in the preview, so included along with populated overhead components per instructions. Excludes depreciation/amortization in SGA and any totals/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D-related line available; usable as the reported R&D expense line.
Header-like line and mostly empty; less useful than populated specific labels.
Populated finance-cost line; broader than pure interest expense, useful fallback if needed.
Other finance costs, not pure interest expense.
Most specific and preferred interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific subcomponent only, not the main reported interest expense line.

variables.notes: Priority list for interest expense: use the specific interest line first, then broader financial expenses as fallback if the label changes by year.

candidates.why: This appears to be total equity plus non-controlling interests / total capitalization and would double count with MIB.
Best book equity line here; mathematically appears to exclude non-controlling interests because Total equity + Non-controlling interests = Total shareholders equity and liabilities minus liabilities.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: Selected Total equity because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests, avoiding double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority interest.
Combined total including NCI, not the standalone minority interest line.
Exact standalone balance sheet NCI line; preferred.
Exact standalone minority interest synonym; useful fallback.
Income statement attribution line, not balance sheet MIB.

variables.notes: Priority list for balance sheet minority interest / non-controlling interests.
